name: Slice Pizzeria & Sports Bar
about: Slice Pizzeria & Sports Bar at Owl's Nest Resort offers a casual, family-friendly atmosphere with indoor golf simulators for year-round fun. It combines dining and entertainment, allowing guests to play golf while enjoying handcrafted pizzas and craft beverages. Located within the resort in the White Mountains, it features a relaxed atmosphere with modern décor, making it a social destination for players of all ages and skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Unique combination of dining and entertainment
Year-round indoor golf access regardless of weather
Over 80 virtual golf courses with stunning 3D graphics
Precision performance tracking for serious practice
Relaxed social atmosphere for all skill levels
Convenient location within a resort destination

food_and_drink.notes: Handcrafted pizzas available for dining during play
Craft beverages and beer available, including $4 Miller Lites during sports events

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, golf clubs are likely provided at the venue, though bringing personal clubs is always an option.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, Slice Pizzeria & Sports Bar has its own kitchen and full bar serving handcrafted pizzas and craft beverages.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With indoor simulators, 18 holes typically take 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Slice Pizzeria & Sports Bar offers a casual, family-friendly atmosphere suitable for all ages and skill levels.
